languages.text: Cada vez que el usuario realiza un ataque contra un solo objetivo situado en un radio de 3 casillas, efectúa un disparo con este aumento inmediatamente después. Este disparo inflige {uip|Damage|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354} de {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}daño de energía{/g} con un {uip|Penetration|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g}.

languages.text: Führt der Nutzer einen Einzelziel-Angriff auf ein Ziel in einem Radius von 3 Feldern aus, schießt er unmittelbar danach mit dieser Augmentation. Dieser Angriff verursacht {uip|Damage|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354} {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}Energieschaden{/g} mit {uip|Penetration|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354} % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g}.

languages.text: Kullanıcı, 3 hücrelik yarıçap içindeki bir hedefe tek hedefli bir saldırı gerçekleştirdiğinde hemen ardından bu ogmentle bir atış yapar. Bu atış, %{uip|Penetration|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354} {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahip {uip|Damage|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354} {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}enerji hasarı{/g} verir.
languages.original_text: Whenever the user performs a single-target attack against a target in a 3-cell radius, they make a shot with this augment immediately after. traits.locale_text: Kullanıcı, 3 hücrelik yarıçap içindeki bir hedefe tek hedefli bir saldırı gerçekleştirdiğinde hemen ardından bu ogmentle bir atış yapar. Bu atış, %{uip|Penetration|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354} {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahip {uip|Damage|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354} {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}enerji hasarı{/g} verir.

languages.text: Chaque fois que l'utilisateur lance une attaque à cible unique contre une cible située dans un rayon de 3 cases, il décoche un tir avec cette augmentation immédiatement après. Le tir inflige {uip|Damage|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354} points de {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}dégâts d'énergie{/g} avec {uip|Penetration|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g}.
languages.original_text: Whenever the user performs a single-target attack against a target in a 3-cell radius, they make a shot with this augment immediately after. traits.locale_text: Chaque fois que l'utilisateur lance une attaque à cible unique contre une cible située dans un rayon de 3 cases, il décoche un tir avec cette augmentation immédiatement après. Le tir inflige {uip|Damage|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354} points de {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}dégâts d'énergie{/g} avec {uip|Penetration|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g}.

languages.text: 每当使用者对3格内的目标进行单体攻击后，会立即使用此植入物射击一次，造成附带{uip|Penetration|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354}%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的{uip|Damage|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354}点{g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}能量伤害{/g}。
languages.original_text: Whenever the user performs a single-target attack against a target in a 3-cell radius, they make a shot with this augment immediately after. It deals {uip|Damage|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354} {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g} with {uip|Penetration|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 每当使用者对3格内的目标进行单体攻击后，会立即使用此植入物射击一次，造成附带{uip|Penetration|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354}%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的{uip|Damage|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354}点{g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}能量伤害{/g}。

languages.text: 使用者が半径3マス以内の対象に単体攻撃を行うたびに、直後にこのオーグメティックで射撃を行う。これは{uip|Damage|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354}の{g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}エネルギーダメージ{/g}を{uip|Penetration|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354}%の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}で与える。
languages.original_text: Whenever the user performs a single-target attack against a target in a 3-cell radius, they make a shot with this augment immediately after. It deals {uip|Damage|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354} {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g} with {uip|Penetration|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 使用者が半径3マス以内の対象に単体攻撃を行うたびに、直後にこのオーグメティックで射撃を行う。これは{uip|Damage|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354}の{g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}エネルギーダメージ{/g}を{uip|Penetration|0998422eefc74e1f984449fea7ce1354}%の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}で与える。
